source_url: hand-drafted from apps/kaito/src/client.rs (docs.kaito.ai has no public API reference at time of drafting)

completeness.notes: Spec mirrors the surface used by the Aomi crate: GET /yaps, GET /search, GET /trending, GET /mindshare/{token} against https://api.kaito.ai/api/v1 (overridable via KAITO_API_ENDPOINT). Auth is bearer via the Authorization header (KAITO_API_KEY). /yaps has a documented response shape (Yaps Open Protocol — typed concretely as YapsScore). /search, /trending, /mindshare are modelled as opaque JsonObject (additionalProperties: true) because the upstream public docs (docs.kaito.ai) do not publish per-field response shapes. Refine response schemas once Kaito publishes a real reference. Component name `JsonObject` chosen to avoid progenitor inline-enum collisions.
